extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install
schema_notes: Each stats[] entry is {row_index: int, stat_id: str}.
stat_id is the canonical engine-side identifier (e.g., 'level', 'main_hand_weapon_type', 'base_cold_damage_+%', 'current_endurance_charges').

row_index is the 0-based row offset in stats.datc64 - this is what Stat1..4 keys in mods.datc64 reference, what per-node stat refs in passiveskills.datc64 reference, and what grantedeffectstatsets entries reference.
Use this dataset to resolve stat_key -> stat_id when displaying mod/passive/gem effects to users.
JSON is compact-formatted (no pretty-print) to keep the file under 2 MB; load with json.loads() and access programmatically rather than reading visually.
downstream_usage: src/data/game_data.py::load_stats() returns this as a Dict[int, str] via {entry['row_index']: entry['stat_id'] for entry in payload['stats']}.
Mods data (data/game/mods/mods.json): each stats[].stat_key is a row_index in this table.
Passive tree data (data/game/passive_tree/tree.json): stat references on nodes use these row indices.
Support gems data (data/game/support_gems/support_gems.json): stat effects already resolved via the same lookup at extraction time.
data_policy: Extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
